prompt: Use the provided reference image of me for facial resemblance only. Do not copy the original pose, clothing, hairstyle, background, or lighting. Transform me into a powerful futuristic creative leader / cyberpunk visionary. Create a high-end cinematic cyberpunk poster featuring a confident South Asian male sitting in a black leather executive chair, wearing an all-black luxury outfit: black tailored blazer, black shirt, black trousers, premium watch, and polished dark styling. Change the hairstyle into a fuller messy cinematic hairstyle with volume, slightly longer textured hair, and keep a sharp well-groomed beard. Expression should be intense, calm, confident, and dominant. Composition: The main subject is seated in the center-right, leaning slightly forward with one hand near the face and the other resting on the chair arm. Behind him, show a massive semi-transparent side-profile portrait of his face on the left, made from blue digital glitch fragments, pixel displacement, scanlines, broken data blocks, and holographic distortion. Visual style: ultra-detailed, dramatic lighting, blue and orange contrast, sharp shadows, glossy reflections, broken glass particles, digital corruption, cybernetic overlays, holographic UI, fragmented neon data, premium editorial composition, powerful atmosphere, cinematic realism, high fashion advertising, dark luxury aesthetic. Typography: Add bold poster text on the right side: “CREATE YOUR REALITY”. Add smaller text elements: “BUILT DIFFERENT FOR A DIFFERENT PATH”, “FOCUS. DISCIPLINE. VISION. LEGACY.”, “NOTHING IS RANDOM. EVERY MOVE IS YOU.”, “DISCIPLINE TODAY. LEGACY TOMORROW.” Use clean futuristic typography mixed with brush-style impact text. Keep text minimal, stylish, and integrated into the design. Mood: powerful, mysterious, premium, visionary, cinematic, rebellious, futuristic, confident, high-status, artistic, dramatic. Format: vertical poster, 4:5 ratio, ultra-realistic, high-resolution, sharp facial details, natural skin texture.
